summary: End-to-end validation of the 18 Legiones Astartes expansion. Backend merge logic in /app/backend/server.py was exercised via 44 new pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_legions.py (all 18 legions list + detail, identity/trait/color overrides, Dark Angels compositionRulesAppend, 404 path, baseline-roster inheritance). All 94 backend tests across the suite pass (no regressions). Frontend smoke covered the Landing grid (18/18 cards + counter), Builder for 3 legions (Dark Angels, Salamanders, Alpha Legion) with trait card + Tactical Detachment add (275 pts), and localStorage persistence across reload.

issues: 'Choose Your Allegiance' grid still shows the 'More Legions / Classified' Coming Soon placeholder tile even though all 18 legions are now available. Consider hiding it or repurposing for Mechanicum / Solar Auxilia teases.

tests_executed.name: Identity overrides applied in list (name/color/trait per legion)
GET /api/factions/{id} for all 18 legions returns full doc with formations/upgrades/units inherited from baseline
All 18 legions share baseline formation/unit counts (no roster loss on merge)
Dark Angels compositionRulesAppend merges Dreadwing/Ravenwing/Deathwing rule WITHOUT dropping baseline rules
Landing shows 18 faction cards with data-testid=faction-card-<id>
Landing counter reads '18 legions online' rendered uppercase via CSS (visually '18 LEGIONS ONLINE')
Builder Dark Angels -> name + 'Grim Resolve' trait card rendered
Builder Salamanders -> name + 'Promethean Fire' trait card rendered
Builder Alpha Legion -> name + 'Hydra’s Many Heads' trait card rendered
Tactical Detachment add via add-formation-btn -> add-formation-tactical-detachment updates total 0->275 pts
Save then navigate Landing -> /armies: army persists in localStorage key 'eoa.armies.v1' with correct factionId/name/formations[]

action_items: (Optional UX) Hide or repurpose the 'More Legions / Classified' placeholder card on the Landing grid now that all 18 legions ship.

(Optional UX) Faction cards on Landing link to /armies but do not pre-select the clicked legion in the New Army dialog. Consider deep-linking ?faction=<id> or routing to /armies?new=<id> so a player who clicks 'Dark Angels -> Build' lands on a Forge Army dialog with Dark Angels pre-selected.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py build_factions() re-reads JSON on every request and deep-copies the baseline for each legion. Correct for hot-reload and isolation, but each /api/factions/{id} call deep-copies ~70 units * 46 formations * 18 legions when listing - acceptable for an MVP-scale dataset, but worth caching with an mtime check if the roster grows.
Merge order is correct: compositionRulesAppend extends after a potential compositionRules override; legions.json only uses Append for Dark Angels so the baseline rules stay intact (verified by test).
build_factions() falls back to baseline_list[0] when baseFactionId is misconfigured, but never logs the misconfiguration - add a logger.warning so silent fallbacks are observable.
Landing.jsx hardcodes hero LORE to a Sons of Horus quote even though the grid now lists 18 legions. Hero copy should either rotate or use neutral Heresy-era framing.
Landing 'faction-card-coming-soon' placeholder is now stale (all 18 legions present) - flagged under design_issues.
Color contrast: white-scars uses #E6E2D3 (near-white) on the dark panel - reads fine, but the Active badge text-[#050505] bg-[#2D937D] will not adapt to per-legion accent. Cosmetic only.
Backend has no /api/health endpoint; root '/' returns the faction id list which is fine for now but consider a dedicated readiness probe before deploy.
seed_data_creation: During Playwright run, created 3 test armies (TEST_dark-angels_v2, TEST_salamanders_v2, TEST_alpha-legion_v2) in localStorage key 'eoa.armies.v1'. Client-side only; no server-side side-effects.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression: run `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. The new merge logic is exercised by test_legions.py (44 cases). Frontend flow used: Landing -> /armies -> [data-testid=new-army-btn] -> dialog [new-army-name, new-army-faction(select)] -> confirm-new-army -> /builder/:id ([builder-army-name, legion-trait]) -> [add-formation-btn] -> [add-formation-dialog] -> [add-formation-tactical-detachment] -> [builder-save-btn]. Persistence key: 'eoa.armies.v1'. The Landing 'Choose Your Allegiance' counter is rendered with Tailwind 'uppercase' class so the DOM text is lowercase ('18 legions online') but visually 'LEGIONS ONLINE' - tests should compare case-insensitively.
rca of the issue: No bugs reproduced. Merge logic correctly inherits roster (formations/upgrades/units) from sons-of-horus baseline while overriding identity (id/name/subtitle/color/lore) and legionTrait. compositionRulesAppend appends without replacing; compositionRules overrides replace fully. 404 path verified.
